title: The Unsolved Murder of the Spy

scenes.text: A hidden life ended in a mysterious killing.
It happened in Berlin, Germany, during the Cold War in 1986.
The body of a British spy was discovered, leaving behind lingering questions.
Despite investigations, the murder remains officially unsolved.
scenes.label: OFFICIALLY UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow for daily true crime mysteries.

description: 📍 Berlin, Germany - 1986. The murder of a British spy after a life of secrecy remains unsolved, leaving questions in its wake. Follow for daily cold cases!
